_meta.name: Sporeus — Edge Function Overview
_meta.description: Invocation counts, error rates and latency histograms for all 21 edge functions.
_meta.import_instructions: Axiom → Dashboards → New → Import JSON → paste this file

charts.title: Invocations by function (5-min buckets)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn != "" | summarize count() by bin(_time, 5m), fn | sort by _time desc

charts.title: Error rate % per function (1h)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn != "" | summarize total=count(), errors=countif(status=="error") by fn | extend error_pct=round(errors*100.0/total,2) | sort by error_pct desc

charts.title: p95 latency per function (1h)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where status != "alive" | summarize p50=percentile(duration_ms,50), p95=percentile(duration_ms,95), p99=percentile(duration_ms,99) by fn | sort by p95 desc

charts.title: Worker heartbeat liveness
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where status=="alive" | summarize last_beat=max(_time) by fn | extend stale=(now()-last_beat)>timespan(5m) | where stale==true

charts.title: Total errors today
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where _time >= startofday(now()) | where status=="error" | summarize count()
